ew_context: AUDCAD breaking above consolidation suggests commodity currency strength in risk-on environment
pattern_desc: Strong breakout above heavily defended resistance at 0.9757 with 110 prior touches - major institutional level. RSI at 76.3% shows strong momentum
key_levels: Support: 0.9757 (major institutional level), 0.9724 (pullback support). Resistance: 0.9801 (swing high), 0.9863 (target)
invalidation: Return below 0.9757 level with 110 touches would signal failed breakout attempt
market_context: Iran ceasefire supports risk assets. AUD benefits from commodity strength while CAD faces pressure from potential energy market shifts
